original_hypothesis.title: Owner Can Set Fees Above BPS Causing Underflow DoS on All Claims
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: ILOManager.setPlatformFee() and setPerformanceFee() have no upper bound validation. In Solidity 0.7.6, if feeBPS >= 10000 (BPS), _deductFees computes `amount0 - FullMath.mulDiv(amount0, feeBPS, BPS)` which underflows (no overflow checks), producing ~2^256. This massive value causes subsequent token transfers to revert, permanently DoSing all claims for projects initialized with the excessive fee. Fees are snapshot at project creation time.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: While uint16 caps at 65535, values from 10000-65535 all cause underflow. Any new project initialized after a fee change inherits the broken fee. This is a missing validation that enables permanent fund locking.
original_hypothesis.config_evidence: ILOManager.sol lines 105-113: setPlatformFee/setPerformanceFee have no bounds check; uint16 max = 65535 > 10000

proof_of_signal.pattern: amount0Left = amount0 - FullMath.mulDiv(amount0, feeBPS, BPS); underflows when feeBPS >= BPS in Solidity 0.7.6

preconditions: ILOManager owner sets PLATFORM_FEE or PERFORMANCE_FEE >= 10000
New project is initialized (snapshots the fee)
Project launches; user attempts to claim

initial_economic_evidence.manipulation_vector: Owner sets fee > BPS; all new projects have broken claims
initial_economic_evidence.profit_hypothesis: User funds permanently locked in ILO pools; potential extortion by admin

economic_questions: How many projects would be affected before the fee is corrected?
Can the fee be corrected retroactively for existing projects?
What is the total value at risk across affected pools?
validation_requirements: Confirm fees are snapshot at project creation and immutable per project

preliminary_attack_economics.estimated_capital_needed: Admin key compromise or malicious admin
preliminary_attack_economics.potential_profit_range: All funds in affected pools permanently locked

potential_victim_impact.direct_victims: All investors in projects initialized after fee change
potential_victim_impact.estimated_impact_per_user: 100% loss of invested and vested funds
potential_victim_impact.total_value_at_risk: All raised capital in affected projects

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
